name: Bean Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Drain the beans and transfer them to a large mixing bowl.
3. Mix together the tomato sauce, prepared mustard, barbecue sauce, dry mustard, and brown sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the sauce mixture into the beans.
5. Pour the bean bake mixture into a large, oblong baking dish.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. Serve hot or cold. (This recipe works with just one kind of beans, of course, or whatever variety you have in the pantry.)
